title: TransitionResult
description: Result of `rebar transition … --output json` and `rebar reopen` (and the library transition()/reopen() / MCP transition_ticket/reopen_ticket): {ticket_id, from, to, newly_unblocked[]}. newly_unblocked lists tickets unblocked by a close (empty otherwise). Exit 10 (ConcurrencyError) on a stale current_status still applies and emits no JSON.
